2604.28021.title: Universal statistical laws governing culinary design
2604.28021.paper_summary: Cooking is a cultural expression of human creativity that transcends geography and time through the orchestration of ingredients and techniques, much like languages do through words and syntax. Yet, beneath the apparent diversity of culinary traditions, whether recipes obey statistical laws comparable to those of other symbolic systems remains unknown. Here we analyze a large corpus of traditional recipes spanning global cuisines, annotated using a state-of-the-art named entity recognition algorithm into ingredients, cooking techniques, utensils, and other culinary attributes. We find that ingredient usage exhibits Zipf-like rank-frequency scaling, that culinary diversity grows sublinearly with corpus size in accordance with Heaps' law, and that recipe complexity follows Menzerath-Altmann-type relations between the number and average information of constituent units. Consistent with observations in packaged foods, macronutrient concentrations across recipes also display a log-normal signature. Minimal generative models based on preferential reuse, constrained sampling, and incremental modification recapitulate these regularities, suggesting generic processes that shape recipe architecture across cultures. Together, these findings establish recipes as a compositional symbolic system in which complex structure emerges from simple, constrained generative processes.
2604.28021.paper_summary_zh: 烹飪是人類創造力的一種文化表達，透過食材和技術的協調超越了地理和時間，這與語言透過單詞和句法的表達方式相似。<lb/>然而，在烹飪傳統表面上的多樣性之下，食譜是否遵循與其他符號系統相當的統計法則仍然未知。<lb/>在這裡，我們分析了一個涵蓋全球美食的大型傳統食譜語料庫，這些食譜使用最先進的命名實體識別算法進行了標註，分為食材、烹飪技術、器具和其他烹飪屬性。<lb/>我們發現，食材的使用顯示出類似Zipf法則的排名-頻率縮放，烹飪多樣性隨著語料庫大小的增長而以次線性方式增長，這符合Heap法則，並且食譜的複雜性遵循成分單位數量和平均信息之間的Menzerath-Altmann型關係。<lb/>與包裝食品中的觀察結果一致，食譜中的大宗營養素濃度也顯示出對數正態特徵。<lb/>基於偏好重用、約束取樣和增量修改的最小生成模型重現了這些規律，暗示著塑造跨文化食譜架構的通用過程。<lb/>綜合這些發現，確立了食譜作為一種組合符號系統，其中複雜結構源於簡單、受限的生成過程。
2604.28021.author: Ganesh Bagler et.al.
2604.28021.authors: Ganesh Bagler, Gopal Krishna Tewari, Aditya Raj Yadav, Akshat Singh, Pranay Bansal, Ujjval Dargar, Mansi Goel, Madhvi Kumari Sinha
